hooks.command: python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load(sys.stdin); p=d.get('tool_input',{}).get('file_path',''); sys.exit(2 if 'test-status' in p else 0)" || { echo 'BLOCKED: test-status.* chỉ do track.py ghi. Chạy: make verify' >&2; exit 2; }

python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load(sys.stdin); p=d.get('tool_input',{}).get('file_path',''); print(p if p.endswith('.go') else '')" | xargs -r -I{} sh -c 'gofmt -w {} && go vet ./... 2>&1 | head -20'
